Part.Source:
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon016_ZerarCancLiberarCredito, &ZerarQtdCanCfgVlr) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon030_LiberaCreditoDataEmissao, &AlterarDtaCfgVlr) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon153_AutorizarPagamento, &AutorizaPagamento_TCon153)
&HojeData = Serverdate() //GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'PEDIDO' &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&PedCod)) &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Update Endif
Do Case Case &OqueFazer = 'CAN' //CAncela Credito For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsAna = Status_Analisado.NaoAnalisado
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedStsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), ' / / ', &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), '', &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif
PedStsAna = &PedStsAna PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
PedStsPgto = 'N' PedDtaCrd.SetEmpty() PedStsCrd.SetEmpty()
Exit EndFor
Commit
CriticasPedido.Call( &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.DesautorizadoCredito, &PesCod)
Case &OqueFazer = 'PAR' //LIBERADO PARCIAL For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsAna = Status_Analisado.AutorizadoParcial if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedStsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) If PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.NAO_AUTORIZADO prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), ' / / ', &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), '', &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif Endif
PedStsAna = &PedStsAna PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
If PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.NAO_AUTORIZADO PedDtaCrd.SetEmpty() PedStsCrd.SetEmpty() PedStsPgto = 'N' EndIf
Exit EndFor
Commit
Case &OqueFazer = 'ANA' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsAna = Status_Analisado.Analisado
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedStsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) If PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.NAO_AUTORIZADO prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), ' / / ', &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), '', &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif Endif
PedStsAna = &PedStsAna PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
If PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.NAO_AUTORIZADO PedDtaCrd.SetEmpty() PedStsCrd.SetEmpty() PedStsPgto = 'N' EndIf
Exit EndFor
Commit
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.Analisado, &PesCod)
Case &OqueFazer = 'AUTM' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO &OldPedObsAna = PedObsAna PedObsAna += ' ' + &PedObsAna.Trim() PedObsAna = trim(PedObsAna)
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedStsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(&OldPedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID )
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsCrd)), &LogErpRegGUID )
If &AlterarDtaCfgVlr = 'S' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaEms', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaEms)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif Endif
PedDtaCrd = &HojeData PedStsCrd = &PedStsCrd
If &AlterarDtaCfgVlr = 'S' PedDtaEms = &HojeData EndIF
if &ZerarQtdCanCfgVlr = 'S' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where PedQtdCan <> 0 PedQtdCan = 0 EndFor EndIf
Exit EndFor
Commit
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.LiberadoCredito, &PesCod) Case &OqueFazer = 'AUT' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsCrd)), &LogErpRegGUID )
If &AlterarDtaCfgVlr = 'S' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaEms', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaEms)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif Endif
PedDtaCrd = &HojeData PedStsCrd = &PedStsCrd PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
If &AlterarDtaCfgVlr = 'S' PedDtaEms = serverdate() EndIF
if &ZerarQtdCanCfgVlr = 'S' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where PedQtdCan <> 0 PedQtdCan = 0 EndFor EndIf
Exit EndFor
Commit
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.LiberadoCredito, &PesCod)
Case &OqueFazer = 'AUP' if &AutorizaPagamento_TCon153 <> 'N' //Nao fazer nada For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsCrd)), &LogErpRegGUID )
If &AlterarDtaCfgVlr = 'S' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaEms', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaEms)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif Endif
if &AutorizaPagamento_TCon153 = 'A' or &AutorizaPagamento_TCon153.IsEmpty() PedStsPgto = 'S' Endif
PedDtaCrd = &HojeData PedStsCrd = &PedStsCrd PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
If &AlterarDtaCfgVlr = 'S' PedDtaEms = &HojeData EndIF
if &ZerarQtdCanCfgVlr = 'S' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where PedQtdCan <> 0 PedQtdCan = 0 EndFor EndIf
Exit EndFor
Commit
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.LiberadoCredito, &PesCod) Else CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.LiberadoCredito, -1) Endif
Case &OqueFazer = 'DES' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.NAO_AUTORIZADO
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedDtaCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&HojeData)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedStsCrd', trim(toformattedString(PedStsCrd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedStsCrd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif
PedDtaCrd = &HojeData PedStsCrd = &PedStsCrd PedStsPgto = 'N' PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
Exit EndFor
Commit
CriticasPedido.Call( &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.DesautorizadoCredito, &PesCod)
Case &OqueFazer = 'XXX' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedObsAna', trim(toformattedString(PedObsAna)), trim(toformattedString(&PedObsAna)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif
PedObsAna = &PedObsAna
Exit EndFor
Commit EndCase
PedNovStsCod_FORMULA.Call( &EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod)
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedCod, in:&PesCod, in:&wwpContextUserName, in:&OqueFazer, in:&PedObsAna);
